title: SAFe Orchestration Harness Finding
description: A structured deterministic harness report item. Findings are not open_items; only selected findings project into open_items as clarification or challenge entries.

schema_version.description: Finding schema version for future-compatible harness report readers.

severity.description: Operational severity emitted by the deterministic harness.

type.description: Stable finding classification used for routing and aggregation.

path.description: Artifact path, trace path, command label, or logical location where the finding was raised.

message.description: Human-readable finding summary suitable for stderr output or gate collation.

route.description: Deterministic next-action class; determines whether the finding routes to a participant, flow repair, gate collation, environment block, or open_items projection.

open_item_projection.description: Whether the finding should be materialized into the unit open_items ledger, and if so under which backlog kind.

blocking.description: Whether the finding blocks the current return boundary or next gate until corrected, deferred, or waived.

orchestrator.description: Orchestrator layer associated with the finding when known.

handler.description: Handler contract id associated with the finding when known.

product.description: Product slug associated with the finding when the unit is product-scoped.

unit_id.description: Epic, Feature, or Story id associated with the finding.

owner.description: Agent hat, human, or flow owner expected to resolve the finding when it projects to an open item or routed repair.

participant.description: Missing or implicated participant when the finding concerns dispatch or evidence completion.

evidence.description: Missing or implicated handler evidence token when the finding concerns evidence completion.

suggestion.description: Optional correction hint generated by the harness or adapter.
